description: A comprehensive MuJoCo-based dexterous hand data collection system. Features 24-DOF hand performing five-finger grasping, cap rotation, and precise object manipulation. Enables automated generation of high-quality manipulation datasets for robotic learning.
descriptionZh: 基于MuJoCo的灵巧手数据采集系统，五指协调抓取与瓶盖旋转
features: 24-DOF dexterous hand with realistic physics and materials
Five-finger coordinated grasping with tactile feedback
Precision manipulation: vial grasping and cap rotation
Adaptive grip force adjustment based on touch sensing
Hybrid Controller 95+: FSM mode selection, confidence-driven decision, auto-degradation/recovery
Fast slip detection and recovery (4ms response)
Advanced control: PID, impedance, force control
Triage task scenario with medical objects
applications: Accessibility aids for persons with disabilities
